title: Viners Assure 8” Carving Knife Stainless Steel Blade with Squared Tip for Safety, Soft Grip Handle, Non-Stick Coating, Rust-Resistant, Ideal for Slicing Meat, Poultry & Roasts
features: CARVING KNIFE | Cook with safety and performance assured. The Assure Carving Knife features a sleek and stylish blade designed to be safe to use in and around the home. Be at the forefront of the next generation of kitchen knives.

INNOVATIVE DESIGN | Designed with a squared tip to reduce accidents, this carving knife provides added safety without compromising precision. The curved soft touch handle offers a secure and comfortable grip while slicing.

FINE QUALITY BLADE | The carving knife has a rust-resistant stainless steel blade, perfect for slicing meat, poultry and roasts. The squared blade also features a non-stick coating to reduce friction while cutting. Hand wash only.

ASSURE RANGE | Designed with safety, quality and performance in mind, the Assure range offers professional performance without compromising on style. The full collection includes essential knives and knife block sets.

VINERS HERITAGE | Viners is the leading cutlery specialist in the UK with an illustrious history dating back over 110 years. We inspire aspirational tablescapes and home entertaining. From elegant cutlery to stylish serve-ware, barware, and innovative food prep tools, we empower food enthusiasts to create with confidence.
